phrases.intent_en: Ask where the seafood stalls are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los puestos de marisco?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAHN lohs PWEHS-tohs deh mah-REE-skoh?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, sección central.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah sehth-thee-ÓN thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, central section.

responses.english: On the ground floor, central section.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah sehth-thee-ÓN thehnt-RAHL
responses.local: En la planta baja, sección central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where regional cheese vendors are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, busco puestos de queso regional.
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, BOOS-koh PWES-tohs deh KEH-soh reh-hyoh-NAHL.

likely_response.local: Pasillo tres, puestos del veinticinco al treinta.
likely_response.pronunciation: pah-SEEL-loh TREHS poo-EH-stohs DEHL beh-een-tee-THEEN-koh AHL treh-EEN-tah
likely_response.translation_en: Aisle three, stalls twenty-five to thirty.

responses.english: Aisle three, stalls twenty-five to thirty.
responses.phonetic: pah-SEEL-loh TREHS poo-EH-stohs DEHL beh-een-tee-THEEN-koh AHL treh-EEN-tah
responses.local: Pasillo tres, puestos del veinticinco al treinta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where prepared food stalls are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden comida preparada para llevar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-day VEN-den ko-MEE-da preh-pa-RA-da pa-ra ye-VAHR?

likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the right.

responses.english: At the back, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if fresh barnacles are available today
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYEH-nehn pehr-SEH-beh FREHS-koh oy?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the chalkboard.

responses.english: It is indicated on the chalkboard.
